message:
fix(scheduler,timer): improve local task routing and timer deadline accuracy

Scheduler (three_lane.rs):
- Local (!Send) tasks can now be routed to pinned worker queues when spawned
  from non-owner threads, instead of panicking. Falls back to pinned worker's
  local_ready queue when direct TLS scheduling isn't possible.
- Extract pinned_worker() from task record for cross-thread local scheduling.

Timer wheel (wheel.rs):
- Optimize next_deadline() to return actual entry deadlines instead of
  eagerly returning current_time() for any live ready entry. Only returns
  current time when an entry's deadline has truly passed.
- Prevents spurious early wakeups when ready entries have future deadlines.
- Add next_deadline_ready_same_tick_returns_actual_deadline test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
